what: UAT coordination for FSC-2417: sign_off_required=True, received=False — verdict=BLOCKED
why: FSC-2417 is a HIGH-FCA story with zero UAT tests defined and 0.0% code coverage, making it blocked for release. A Compliance Officer (CO) sign-off request must be sent immediately; however, sign-off cannot be granted until comprehensive UAT test coverage is established and all tests pass. The story must remain in UAT until test suite completion and CO approval are both documented.
